results.rendered_html:
akulīna a. [na. ta.]
1 Low-born, of no high descent.
2 Not belonging to the earth, not earthly; divyayoṣitamiva akulīnāṃ  K. 11  (a pun on the word; na kau pṛthvyāṃ līnā sthitā).
